Package com.rays.common.impl

Class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - DTO type extending BaseDTO
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseDAOInt<T>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AttachmentDAOImpl, CollegeDAOImpl, CourseDAOImpl, FacultyDAOImpl, MarksheetDAOImpl, RoleDAOImpl, StudentDAOImpl, SubjectDAOImpl, TimetableDAOImpl, UserDAOImpl
    public abstract class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
extends java.lang.Object
implements BaseDAOInt<T>
    Base Data Access Object implementation providing common database operations using JPA Criteria API.
    Author:
    Aniket Rajput

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected javax.persistence.EntityManager entityManager

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long add​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Adds a new entity to the database.
      protected javax.persistence.TypedQuery<T> createCriteria​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Creates a TypedQuery for searching based on the DTO criteria.
      void delete​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes an entity from the database.
      T findByPk​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Finds an entity by its primary key ID.
      T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute, java.lang.Object value, UserContext userContext)
      Finds an entity by a unique key attribute.
      abstract java.lang.Class<T> getDTOClass()
      Gets the DTO class for this DAO implementation.
      protected abstract java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(T dto, javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder builder, javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T> qRoot)
      Builds the WHERE clause predicates for search criteria.
      protected boolean isEmptyString​(java.lang.String val)
      Checks if a string is null or empty.
      protected boolean isNotNull​(java.lang.Object val)
      Checks if an object is not null.
      protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Double val)
      Checks if a Double value is null or zero.
      protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Integer val)
      Checks if an Integer value is null or zero.
      protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Long val)
      Checks if a Long value is null or zero.
      void populate​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates additional fields in the DTO before persistence.
      java.util.List<T> search​(T dto, int pageNo, int pageSize, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria with pagination.
      java.util.List<T> search​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria.
      void update​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Updates an existing entity in the database.

    • Method Detail

      • getWhereClause

        protected abstract java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(T dto,
                                                                                       javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder builder,
                                                                                       javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T> qRoot)
        Builds the WHERE clause predicates for search criteria.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        builder - the CriteriaBuilder instance
        qRoot - the Root instance for the entity
        Returns:
        list of Predicates for the WHERE clause

      • getDTOClass

        public abstract java.lang.Class<T> getDTOClass()
        Gets the DTO class for this DAO implementation.
        Returns:
        the Class object of the DTO

      • populate

        public void populate​(T dto,
                     UserContext userContext)
        Populates additional fields in the DTO before persistence. Override this method to set custom values.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to populate
        userContext - the user context

      • add

        public long add​(T dto,
                UserContext userContext)
        Adds a new entity to the database.
        Specified by:
        add in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be added
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the generated ID of the added entity

      • update

        public void update​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Updates an existing entity in the database.
        Specified by:
        update in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO with updated values
        userContext - the user context containing current user information

      • delete

        public void delete​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Deletes an entity from the database.
        Specified by:
        delete in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be deleted
        userContext - the user context containing current user information

      • findByPk

        public T findByPk​(long id,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Finds an entity by its primary key ID.
        Specified by:
        findByPk in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key ID to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • findByUniqueKey

        public T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                         java.lang.Object value,
                         UserContext userContext)
        Finds an entity by a unique key attribute.
        Specified by:
        findByUniqueKey in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        attribute - the attribute name to search by
        value - the attribute value to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • createCriteria

        protected javax.persistence.TypedQuery<T> createCriteria​(T dto,
                                                         UserContext userContext)
        Creates a TypedQuery for searching based on the DTO criteria.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        userContext - the user context
        Returns:
        TypedQuery for executing the search

      • search

        public java.util.List<T> search​(T dto,
                                UserContext userContext)
        Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria.
        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of all DTOs matching the search criteria

      • search

        public java.util.List<T> search​(T dto,
                                int pageNo,
                                int pageSize,
                                UserContext userContext)
        Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria with pagination.
        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        pageNo - the page number to retrieve (zero-based)
        pageSize - the number of records per page
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of DTOs matching the search criteria for the specified page

        protected boolean isEmptyString​(java.lang.String val)
        Checks if a string is null or empty.
        Parameters:
        val - the string to check
        Returns:
        true if null or empty, false otherwise

        Returns:

        Returns:
        true if null or zero, false otherwise
